# PERF-180 positive: csv.NewReader(...).Read() called inside a loop
lang: go
file: PERF-180-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"encoding/csv"
	"io"
)

func ParseAll(data []byte) ([][]string, error) {
	r := csv.NewReader(bytes.NewReader(data))
	var rows [][]string
	for {
		row, err := r.Read()
		if err == io.EOF {
			return rows, nil
		}
		if err != nil {
			return rows, err
		}
		rows = append(rows, row)
	}
}
